info.title: Musaium API
info.description: Active API surface for Musaium mobile backend (health, auth, chat, daily-art, reviews, admin, museum, support).

apiKeyAuth.description: B2B API key authentication. Pass the full API key as a Bearer token.

onboardingCompleted.description: Whether the user has completed the onboarding flow

images.description: Enriched images from external sources (Wikidata, Unsplash)

plaintext.description: The full API key — shown only once, never stored.

debugToken.description: Present in development only to simplify local testing.

200.description: Reset email sent (always succeeds to prevent enumeration)
Email change initiated; confirmation message sent to the new address

get.summary: List API keys for the current user

post.summary: Post a text message and receive the assistant response as an SSE stream

200.description: SSE stream of token, guardrail, done, and error events

post.summary: Set or toggle feedback (thumbs up/down) on an assistant message

get.summary: List art keywords by locale, optionally filtered by creation date

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only return keywords created at or after this ISO timestamp

post.summary: Bulk upsert art keywords for guardrail enrichment
Create a review (stored as pending for moderation)

get.summary: Get average rating and approved review count

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.summary: Content analytics (top artworks, museums, guardrail rate)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top items to return

get.summary: Paginated list of all support tickets (admin/moderator)

patch.summary: Update ticket status, priority, or assignment

get.summary: Search museums by location or text query

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Text search query (name filter or geocode input)

200.description: Search results with distance and source

distance.description: Distance in meters from search origin

museumType.description: Museum category derived from OSM tags

get.summary: Get museum by ID or slug

post.summary: Submit a public support contact request
Add a message to a ticket
